sessions.title: Find closed session about manifest env and file changes
sessions.first-prompt: use clyde session to find a session I was working on today talking about making changes the manifest for env and file operations. I think I closed it accidentally. I need the location and the full session-id.

body.text: use clyde session to find a session I was working on today talking about making changes the manifest for env and file operations. I think I closed it accidentally. I need the location and the full session-id.

Found it. This confirms session `9bb86fff-13c6-4c93-b34d-0676441f63f8` is where the manifest-driven-secrets design doc (which references file/env lane + Manifest) was worked on. [truncated for fixture]
